name: kodevibego
absorption_note: Federated crate of phenotype-infra (ADR-049). KodeVibe Go<->Rust bridge — exposes the KodeVibe Rust surface to the KodeVibe Go CLI/runtime via FFI. Distinct from the sibling crates/kodevibego-ffi (raw cdylib glue) which remains un-promoted; this entry is the higher-level, library-style artifact that downstream consumers should depend on.
rationale: Canonical Go/Rust bridge for KodeVibe inside phenotype-infra. Pairs with the federation service via the FfiPort trait (shared with nvms-ffi). Local-only sibling — no standalone GitHub target; canonical path is phenotype-infra/crates/kodevibego.
note: Federated crate (2026-06-24 registry sync). Tracked at the workspace-crate level so kodevibego resolves independently of the raw kodevibego-ffi glue crate (which stays un-promoted). Both are siblings under crates/ in phenotype-infra.
